name: The Continental School of Cairo
description: The Continental School of Cairo (Obour campus) delivers a diverse international curriculum in a modern, well-equipped campus in Qalyubia.

name: Green Valley School
description: Green Valley School is a thriving international community school in Qalyubia, known for its green campus and holistic educational approach.

name: Heritage International School
description: Heritage International School blends cultural heritage with a forward-thinking international curriculum, serving families across Greater Cairo.

name: Roots International School
description: Roots International School is dedicated to nurturing every student's potential, offering a balanced international curriculum with a focus on character.

name: Sama International School
description: Sama International School soars above expectations, offering a premium international education with a diverse student body and vibrant campus life.

name: NIS Obour
description: NIS Obour is a reputed international school in the Obour compound offering a comprehensive curriculum that ensures both academic and personal growth.

name: Greenland International School
description: Greenland International School provides a lush learning environment where students thrive academically, socially, and creatively.

name: STEM School Obour
description: STEM School Obour is a flagship government STEM institution, offering a research and project-based education to Egypt's most talented students.

name: Leaders Language School Obour
description: Leaders Language School in Obour produces confident, multilingual graduates through a strong language curriculum and leadership development programs.

name: Oxford Modern School Obour
description: Oxford Modern School in Obour provides an Oxford-inspired national curriculum with a strong emphasis on English and critical thinking skills.
